title: Wine Tasting: A Professional Handbook (2nd Edition)
description: "Wine Tasting: A Professional Handbook" is a comprehensive guide that covers the principles and techniques of wine tasting. The book provides an in-depth analysis of the sensory evaluation process, including appearance, odor, taste, and finish, to help professionals and enthusiasts develop their wine tasting skills. It serves as a reference for those working in the wine industry, including winemakers, sommeliers, and wine educators.
